cast.name: 刘易斯·汉密尔顿 Lewis Hamilton
尼科·罗斯伯格 Nico Rosberg
塞巴斯蒂安·维特尔 Sebastian Vettel

trans_title: 世界一级方程式锦标赛 第六十六季
introduction: The 2015 FIA Formula One World Championship was the 69th season of FIA Formula One motor racing. It featured the 2015 Formula One World Championship, a motor racing championship for Formula One cars, recognised by the sport's governing body, the Fédération Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), as the highest class of competition for open-wheel racing cars. Twenty-two drivers representing ten teams contested nineteen Grands Prix, starting in Australia on 15 March and ending in Abu Dhabi on 29 November as they competed for the World Drivers' and World Constructors' championships.
chinese_title: 世界一级方程式锦标赛 第六十六季
